test_patch:
diff --git a/utils/cache/cache_suite_test.go b/utils/cache/cache_suite_test.go
index 8c0d2897..c80f86de 100644
--- a/utils/cache/cache_suite_test.go
+++ b/utils/cache/cache_suite_test.go
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ import (
 	. "github.com/onsi/gomega"
 )
 
+// TestCache runs the Ginkgo test suite for the cache package.
 func TestCache(t *testing.T) {
 	tests.Init(t, false)
 	log.SetLevel(log.LevelFatal)
diff --git a/utils/cache/simple_cache_test.go b/utils/cache/simple_cache_test.go
index 227e287e..dcdd1447 100644
--- a/utils/cache/simple_cache_test.go
+++ b/utils/cache/simple_cache_test.go
@@ -2,6 +2,7 @@ package cache
 
 import (
 	"errors"
+	"fmt"
 	"time"
 
 	. "github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2"
@@ -82,4 +83,89 @@ var _ = Describe("SimpleCache", func() {
 			Expect(keys).To(ConsistOf("key1", "key2"))
 		})
 	})
+
+	Describe("Options", func() {
+		Context("when size limit is set", func() {
+			BeforeEach(func() {
+				cache = NewSimpleCache[string](Options{
+					SizeLimit: 2,
+				})
+			})
+
+			It("should not add more items than the size limit", func() {
+				for i := 1; i <= 3; i++ {
+					err := cache.Add(fmt.Sprintf("key%d", i), fmt.Sprintf("value%d", i))
+					Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
+				}
+
+				Expect(cache.Keys()).To(ConsistOf("key2", "key3"))
+			})
+		})
+
+		Context("when default TTL is set", func() {
+			BeforeEach(func() {
+				cache = NewSimpleCache[string](Options{
+					DefaultTTL: 10 * time.Millisecond,
+				})
+			})
+
+			It("should expire items after the default TTL", func() {
+				_ = cache.Add("key", "value")
+
+				time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
+
+				_, err := cache.Get("key")
+				Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
+			})
+		})
+
+		Context("when size limit is set with mixed TTLs", func() {
+			It("should evict by insertion order regardless of TTL", func() {
+				cache = NewSimpleCache[string](Options{
+					SizeLimit: 2,
+				})
+				_ = cache.AddWithTTL("key1", "value1", 10*time.Second)
+				_ = cache.AddWithTTL("key2", "value2", 100*time.Millisecond)
+				_ = cache.AddWithTTL("key3", "value3", 10*time.Second)
+				Expect(cache.Keys()).To(ConsistOf("key2", "key3"))
+			})
+
+			It("should evict by insertion order regardless of access frequency", func() {
+				cache = NewSimpleCache[string](Options{
+					SizeLimit: 2,
+				})
+				_ = cache.AddWithTTL("key1", "value1", 10*time.Second)
+				_ = cache.AddWithTTL("key2", "value2", 10*time.Second)
+				_, err := cache.Get("key1")
+				Expect(err).NotTo(HaveOccurred())
+				_ = cache.AddWithTTL("key3", "value3", 10*time.Second)
+				Expect(cache.Keys()).To(ConsistOf("key2", "key3"))
+			})
+		})
+
+		Context("when eviction is triggered at capacity", func() {
+			It("should evict entries down to half the size limit", func() {
+				cache = NewSimpleCache[string](Options{
+					SizeLimit: 6,
+				})
+				for i := 1; i <= 6; i++ {
+					_ = cache.Add(fmt.Sprintf("key%d", i), fmt.Sprintf("value%d", i))
+				}
+				_ = cache.Add("key7", "value7")
+				Expect(cache.Keys()).To(ConsistOf("key4", "key5", "key6", "key7"))
+			})
+		})
+
+		Context("when default TTL is set with explicit TTL override", func() {
+			It("should cap entry TTL to default TTL", func() {
+				cache = NewSimpleCache[string](Options{
+					DefaultTTL: 50 * time.Millisecond,
+				})
+				_ = cache.AddWithTTL("key", "value", 500*time.Millisecond)
+				time.Sleep(100 * time.Millisecond)
+				_, err := cache.Get("key")
+				Expect(err).To(HaveOccurred())
+			})
+		})
+	})
 })
